title: Vicloon 3Pcs-Pattern 2 Cotton Teething Wave Design Bibs, Waterproof, Unisex Baby Bibs for Newborns, Toddlers, Babies
features: 【3 Piece Wavy Bib Set】The baby bibs come in 3 patterns: Rainbow Bear/Tulip Bear/Airplane, which can be replaced and washed at any time. Newborn bibs are easy to carry and are available in a variety of patterns and colors.

【Soft and Absorbent】 Baby bibs are made of 100% cotton (muslin), which is skin-friendly, soft, comfortable and breathable, providing maximum comfort to your baby. Reusable and durable, keeps baby's neck clean and drool-free.

【Unique Design】Our bibs feature a ruffled wave design, which is edgy and unique. The simple colors allow our baby bibs to easily match your baby's clothes, easily solving your matching worries. Snap design makes it easy to put on.

【Easy to Clean】These baby teething waterproof bibs can be hand washed, machine washed, and laid flat to dry, making them more convenient to use and easy to organize and carry. These bibs are durable and you don't have to worry about them getting bigger or smaller.

【Best Gift Choice】The multifunctional burp cloth is perfect for catching and trapping drool caused by teething, food, spitting, etc. It can be used not only indoors but also outdoors. It can also be used as a gift for new parents and a baby's first birthday gift.
description: Vicloon baby dripping bibs help parents keep their babies clean and comfortable, easy to carry and change and clean at any time, let our baby bibs protect your baby's healthy and happy growth. Features: 1. Button design, easy to put on and take off. 2. The edges are finely sewn and durable. 3. Super absorbent, not easily deformed after washing, more suitable for skin and soft. Specifications: Material: Cotton Size: Neck Circumference: 29cm Length and Width: 25*22cm Packing List: Baby ruffled U-shaped bibs 3pcs Kind Tips: Due to manual measurement, there may be certain size errors; Due to the shooting environment, there may be some color difference;
